Project: Svelte Globe
Website: https://sv-globe.vercel.app
Repository: https://github.com/SikandarJODD/sv-globe

Summary:
Svelte Globe is a SvelteKit examples site for building COBE globes in Svelte.
It focuses on copyable setup, practical usage patterns, polished demos, and lightweight performance guidance.

Key routes:
- `/` overview
- `/setup` minimal install and starter globe
- `/usage` reusable globe patterns
- `/performance` render-cost and lifecycle guidance
- `/examples` richer showcase demos
- `/llms.txt` machine-readable project guide

Machine-readable docs:
- `/setup.md`
- `/usage.md`
- `/performance.md`
- `/examples.md`
- `/examples/cdn.md`
- `/examples/sticker.md`
- `/examples/flight.md`
- `/examples/satellites.md`
- `/examples/polaroids.md`

Current usage patterns:
- Base setup
- Draggable globe
- Globe colors
- CSS anchor labels
- Focus location
- Dynamic arc tour
- Performance pattern

Performance defaults:
- cap `devicePixelRatio` at `2`
- start with `mapSamples` around `12000-16000`
- use lower values for mobile or dense pages
- pause animation when off-screen or tab-hidden
- destroy the globe on teardown

AI guidance:
- Start with `/setup.md` for first integration.
- Use `/usage.md` for one pattern at a time.
- Use `/performance.md` when tuning runtime cost.
- Use `/examples.md` for richer product-like scenes.
- Prefer the Markdown docs before reading live page code.

---
Built by Bhide Svelte : https://bhide.dev
